description: Israel has issued sweeping evacuation warnings, and pressed some Christian and Druse leaders to expel Shiite Muslims from southern towns, the leaders said.

title: In a Muzzled Russia, He Still Speaks His Mind
description: While hundreds of other journalists fled into exile after Moscow’s invasion of Ukraine in 2022, the Nobel Peace Prize laureate Dmitri A. Muratov stayed. But he did not stay quiet.

title: 2 lightly wounded as Hezbollah fires barrages of over 50 rockets at northern Israel
description:
Iran fires 4 missile salvos at Israel since midnight, some with cluster warheads; 4 wounded in Bnei Brak, including 2 babies * Oil prices surge after Trump vows to hit Iran hard in next few weeks
The post 2 lightly wounded as Hezbollah fires barrages of over 50 rockets at northern Israel appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: The US has counter-mine ships homeported in the Middle East. Are they effective?
description: Some military and defense experts argue the Independence-class littoral combat ship equipped with the MCM mission package falls short of its predecessor.

title: A web of sensors: How the US spots missiles and drones from Iran
description: If a missile is launched from Iran toward a U.S. military base in the region, how do service members know in time to stay safe?

title: Poland holds tight to its Patriot batteries amid reported US call for Middle East transfer
description: “Our allies know well and understand how important are our tasks here,” the country's deputy prime minister and defense minister wrote on social media.

title: South Africa deploys troops to tackle crime in Cape Town townships
description: In tonight’s edition: South Africa ramps up its fight against crime with the deployment of soldiers in Cape Town. Also, the Democratic Republic of Congo gets a chance at World Cup glory for the first time in over half a century. And top African leaders and changemakers gather in Paris for the ChangeNOW international climate summit — we speak to one of them, Elizabeth Wathuti.

title: Viral video falsely claims Israeli Jews are ‘stealing land’ in Morocco
description: Internet users have been sharing a video online that they claim “proves” Israeli Jews are stealing land in Morocco – supposedly reclaiming property from before they emigrated. The footage shows clashes in a crowded scene, but it’s difficult to determine exactly what is happening or where it was filmed. Our fact-checking team at FRANCE 24 Observers investigated these claims and found that the images are being shared out of context. Vedika Bahl bre

title: Burkina Faso army, jihadists have killed more than 1,800 civilians since 2023, HRW says
description: More than 1,800 civilians have been killed in violence-wracked Burkina Faso since 2023, Human Rights Watch said in a report released on Thursday that accuses the army and civilian militias of killing more civilians than jihadists do. The NGO called on prosecutors at the International Criminal Court to investigate war crimes "perpetrated by all parties to the conflict".

title: ‘Orban constantly vetoes’: Europe braces for Hungary election
description: The practicalities of Hungary’s election may not matter as much as the psychological impact, say observers.
